column6: Too muddy to muster — wait for the dry.
Stock work waits for firm ground — wait for the dry.
Wet grass means no supplement needed yet — wait for the dry.
Road trains can't get through in the wet — wait for the dry.
Bores top up from the wet — focus on capital work now.
Fences hold through the dry — save repairs for the wet.
Save grading for the wet — easier on the machine.
Capital work — best in the wet.
Save fleet maintenance for the wet.
